sections.paragraph:
m. the beard (perhaps so called because it covers, and, as it were, clothes the chin; others derive it from שָׂפָה lip, and ־ָם i.q. ־ָן). 2Sa 19:25, לֹא־עָשָׂה שְׂפָמֹו “he had not put his beard in order.” אֶת־הַשָּׂפָם, עָטָה עַל־הַשָּׂפָם to cover over the beard, as done by mourners, Levit. 13:45 Eze 24:17, 22 Eze 24:22 Mic 3:7.

[שִׂפְמֹות Siphmoth, pr.n. 1Sa 30:28.]
